label: India AI Impact Summit 2026
title: Beyond the Hype: Operationalizing AI for the Next Billion
description: A field walk-through from India AI Impact Summit 2026 on what operational AI looks like in practice: custom inferencing hardware for affordability, multilingual systems at population scale, and high-impact deployments across clinical trials, mobility, and food operations.

label: Leadership Circle Reflection
title: Conscious Leadership in India's AI Decade: Inside a Closed-Door Circle
description: A leadership reflection from Bengaluru on AI strategy through three lenses: system, society, and self, with a clear argument for humans in the lead, not just in the loop.

label: Post Summit KeyNote for CTO Community
title: After the Summit Lights Fade: Hard Decisions for India's AI Decade
description: A post-summit leadership reflection for CTOs and tech leaders on what to do next: define your role on India's digital rails, make data and trust architecture production-grade, and move AI governance to board-level execution over the next 12-24 months.

label: ISB Alumni Article
title: When Technology Meets Humanity: Inside India's AI Kumbh and the Blueprint for 1.4 Billion
description: Reflections from a pan-India ISB alumni leadership conversation at India AI Impact Summit 2026. Focused on healthcare AI governance, equity architecture, and why India's SAHI-BODH-ABHA stack creates infrastructure for responsible AI at population scale—where governance and equity are built in by design.

label: Featured Post
title: Completed: ISB Leadership with AI - Levelling Up for AI-Led Leadership
description: Reflections on completing dual ISB executive programmes - CTO + Leadership with AI. Top leadership learnings for AI-era leaders on strategy, governance, ethics, and execution at scale.

label: LinkedIn Article
title: Why 77% of Organizations Can't Scale AI Beyond Pilots
description: A data-driven analysis of what 87 senior executives at ISB revealed about AI scaling barriers, the three structural constraints blocking most organizations, and how the successful 23% approach task distribution.

label: Podcast
title: AI Leadership Dialogues: Why AI ROI Frameworks Built for ERP Fail for AI
description: A practical conversation on why AI programs fail to convert pilots into business outcomes, and the missing operating bridges leaders need now for production-grade ROI.

label: Leadership Post
title: Build a Team So Strong No One Knows Who the Leader Is
description: My leadership operating model for building high-trust, high-accountability teams that scale without heroics, while strengthening succession depth and execution culture.
